rows.label: tev001701_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hello. Is there something
you wished to discuss?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm speaking with someone else
right now, so you'll have to
wait until we're finished.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG0003
rows.name:
But I would very much like to help with
whatever is troubling you. So I hope you'll
come back and ask me again very soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1001
rows.name:
Hello, [ST:playername ]. Will this be another day
of running around NLA and helping
people through their problems?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1002
rows.name:
If it wouldn't be a bother, I
would be most grateful if you'd
allow me to accompany you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0011
rows.name: Add Himeri to your team.

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline Himeri's request for now.

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1003
rows.name:
Thank you very much. I promise
not to slow you down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1004
rows.name:
I understand. If I can ever be
of help to you, please let me
know. You can ask me anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1009
rows.name:
All of us will have to work harder to fill
the void left by Nelson and his team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1010
rows.name:
With that said, if it wouldn't
be too much of a bother, might
I join you on your mission?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0030
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1011
rows.name:
So we're headed to Nightglow
Forest? Then we'll want to be
extremely well prepared.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1012
rows.name:
I understand. If I can ever be of
any help to you, please let me
know. You can ask me anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1017
rows.name:
...The unidentified xenoforms that
have been spotted in Valley of
Oblivion? Yes, I've heard of them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1018
rows.name:
Whatever world they hail from, we all
have a duty to assist those in need.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1019
rows.name:
Let's hurry to their rescue.
I'll do anything to help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0050
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0051
rows.name: Add Himeri to your team.

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0060
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0061
rows.name: Decline Himeri's request for now.

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1020
rows.name:
I'm confident that I can surmount any
threat when I have you fighting beside me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1021
rows.name:
I understand. If I can ever be of
any help to you, please let me
know. You can ask me anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1022
rows.name:
Hello, [ST:playername ]. I'm afraid someone has come to
me with a particularly serious matter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1023
rows.name:
I need to focus on resolving
this situation right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1024
rows.name:
If you were hoping for my assistance with a
mission, I am so terribly sorry. Please promise
that you'll return safely without me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1029
rows.name:
Searching for pieces of the Lifepoint is
a vital task indeed, but the lives of those
searching are more important still.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1030
rows.name:
No amount of losses are acceptable
to me. We have to rescue Iriina.
Please bring me along![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0070
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0071
rows.name: Add Himeri to your team.

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0080
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0081
rows.name: Decline Himeri's request for now.

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1031
rows.name:
I am confident that I can
surmount any threat when I
have you fighting beside me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1032
rows.name:
I understand. If I can ever be of
any help to you, please let me
know. You can ask me anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1037
rows.name:
Many lives were lost and many people
wounded in the recent attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1038
rows.name:
But we have little time left.
So I fear we must fight through
the pain and struggle onward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1039
rows.name:
Would it be an imposition if I asked to join you?
However modest the job, I want to do something that
will bring a sliver of hope to our dispirited neighbors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0090
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0091
rows.name: Add Himeri to your team.

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0100
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0101
rows.name: Decline Himeri's request for now.

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1040
rows.name:
I am confident that I can
surmount any threat when I
have you fighting beside me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1041
rows.name:
I understand. If I can ever be of
any help to you, please let me
know. You can ask me anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1042
rows.name:
Recently many people have been
coming to me to discuss the time
limit on their Blue Bloods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1043
rows.name:
Everyone is trying to project confidence
around those who are unaware, but most seem
plagued by doubt and anxiety from within.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1044
rows.name:
Please allow me to help you. Finding
the Central Life is the only way we
can bring peace to their hearts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0110
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0111
rows.name: Add Himeri to your team.

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0120
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0121
rows.name: Decline Himeri's request for now.

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1045
rows.name:
I am confident that I can
surmount any threat when I
have you fighting beside me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1046
rows.name:
I understand. If I can ever be of
any help to you, please let me
know. You can ask me anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1051
rows.name:
I believe that if we confront Lao
directly, he will acknowledge his
crime and repent for his behavior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1052
rows.name:
But we must speak with him first, for
that is the human thing to do. I would
be happy to help if you need me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0130
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0131
rows.name: Add Himeri to your team.

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0140
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0141
rows.name: Decline Himeri's request for now.

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1053
rows.name:
Let us hurry. We have to reach Lao
before he crosses a point of no return.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1054
rows.name:
I understand. If I can ever be of
any help to you, please let me
know. You can ask me anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1055
rows.name:
When the White Whale set sail, we left
a great many people behind on Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1056
rows.name:
We carry the weight of all those who
weren't chosen. We have a duty to live
on in the stead of those who could not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1057
rows.name:
Please take me with you. I want
to play a part in this battle—whatever
small role it may be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0150
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0151
rows.name: Add Himeri to your team.

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0160
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0161
rows.name: Decline Himeri's request for now.

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1058
rows.name:
Thank you. Let us go and fulfill
the duty we bear for all mankind![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1059
rows.name:
I understand. If I can ever be of
any help to you, please let me
know. You can ask me anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1064
rows.name:
The Central Life has been
secured, but the hearts of our
people remain beset by worry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1065
rows.name:
I hope you will allow me to continue
assisting you in making this world
a happier place for all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0170
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0171
rows.name: Add Himeri to your team.

rows.label: tev001701_JNK0180
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: tev001701_SEL0181
rows.name: Decline Himeri's request for now.

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1066
rows.name:
Then let's be off. I know there
is no challenge I cannot overcome
with you by my side.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001701_MSG1067
rows.name:
Whatever comes, I will always be
here to listen. I want to be of
use to you in any way I can.[ST:wait ]
